summary: Patient presents with a 6-month history of progressive parkinsonism including resting tremor, bradykinesia, rigidity, REM sleep behavior disorder, hyposmia, constipation, low mood, anhedonia, fatigue. Highly suggestive of early Parkinson disease.

circuits.name: cortical_subcortical_motor_pathway
circuits.description: 皮层-基底节运动回路：皮层起始通过皮层中继投射到皮层下中继，再投射到基底节/丘脑，最终到运动输出；同时皮层起始直接投射到多个运动相关区域。

circuits.name: right basal ganglia circuit
circuits.description: The right basal ganglia circuit, including the caudate, putamen, and pallidum, is involved in motor control and learning.

circuits.name: right basal ganglia motor circuit
circuits.description: Right basal ganglia circuit including caudate, putamen, pallidum, and thalamus proper, involved in motor control and learning.

circuits.name: left motor control circuit
circuits.description: Left hemisphere motor circuit including primary motor cortex, somatosensory cortex, basal ganglia (caudate, putamen, pallidum), and thalamus, forming a cortico-basal ganglia-thalamo-cortical loop for voluntary movement control.

circuits.name: right motor control circuit
circuits.description: Right hemisphere motor circuit analogous to left, including primary motor cortex, somatosensory cortex, basal ganglia (caudate, putamen, pallidum), and thalamus, involved in execution of voluntary movements.

circuits.name: left basal ganglia motor circuit
circuits.description: The left basal ganglia motor circuit involves the caudate, putamen, and pallidum, and is crucial for the regulation of voluntary movement.

circuits.name: right sensorimotor circuit
circuits.description: The right precentral gyrus (primary motor cortex) and right postcentral gyrus (primary somatosensory cortex) are adjacent and functionally connected for sensorimotor integration, enabling motor control and somatosensory processing.

circuits.name: cortico-striatal_loop
circuits.description: 左中央前（运动皮质）投射到左尾状核（纹状体），参与基底节运动环路，涉及运动控制和学习的反馈回路。

circuits.name: left frontal eye field circuit
matched_functions: saccadic eye movements and spatial attention
circuits.description: A circuit involving the left frontal eye field (FEF), precentral gyrus, and precuneus, responsible for saccadic eye movements and spatial attention.

circuits.name: cerebellar vermal motor coordination circuit
circuits.description: The cerebellar vermis, including lobules I-V, VI-VII, and VIII-X, is involved in motor coordination, eye movement control, and motor learning. This circuit integrates sensory and motor information to fine-tune movements and maintain balance.

circuits.name: left cerebellum white matter-right cerebellum white matter circuit
circuits.description: Connects left and right cerebellar white matter, facilitating interhemispheric communication for motor coordination and learning.

circuits.name: cerebello_thalamo_cortical_loop
circuits.description: 小脑前叶经丘脑向运动皮质发送纠错信号，形成皮质-脑桥-小脑-丘脑-皮质环路的一部分，参与运动学习与协调。

circuits.name: cortical_thalamic_motor_pathway
circuits.description: 皮层-丘脑运动通路，多个皮层区域投射到丘脑运动核团，再输出到多个运动相关区域，参与运动计划、整合和执行。

circuits.name: thalamic_exit_pathway
circuits.description: 从丘脑到多个下游区域的运动输出通路，参与运动计划和执行。

circuits.name: corticocortical_motor_pathway
circuits.description: This circuit involves region 59cc54de receiving inputs from multiple cortical areas and projecting to several targets, suggesting a role in motor planning and execution.
